scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && npm run copy:data
scripts.copy:data: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = 'data'; const dest = 'dist/data'; if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive: true}); fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src, f), path.join(dest, f)));"
scripts.build:satellites: node scripts/build-satellite-names.cjs && node scripts/merge-satnogs-data.cjs && node scripts/merge-spacetrack-data.cjs
